panels.title: Correction Rate (per meeting)
panels.description: Avg corrections per completed meeting — lower is better (model improving)

panels.title: False Positive Rate
panels.description: % of extracted tasks dismissed by user — model precision signal

panels.title: Training Samples Ready
panels.description: Meetings with ≥1 human correction — usable for fine-tuning

panels.title: Tasks Confirmed vs Dismissed
panels.description: Cumulative user acceptance of extracted tasks

panels.title: Tasks Edited by Field
panels.description: Which fields users edit most — signals model weak spots

panels.title: Correction Rate Over Time
panels.description: Trend of corrections/meeting — decreasing = model improving, spike = drift

panels.title: Training Data Accumulation
panels.description: Growth of training-ready samples and total corrections over time

panels.title: User Edit Patterns
panels.description: Which task fields users edit — persistent pattern = model weak spot for retraining

panels.title: Tasks Confirmed vs Dismissed Rate
panels.description: Rate of user acceptance — sustained low acceptance = model quality degradation

panels.title: Meetings by Model Version
panels.description: Number of completed meetings processed by each model version

panels.title: Correction Rate by Model Version
panels.description: Higher correction rate = worse model quality. Compare versions to detect drift.

panels.title: False Positive Rate Over Time
panels.description: Rolling ratio of dismissed tasks / total tasks. Spikes indicate model quality drop.
